description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, compact layout surrounded by a low fence and landscaped yard. The structure features a flat roof with a central, irregularly shaped pool in the backyard, visible from above. The exterior walls are finished in light neutral tones, complemented by large windows and a small covered entryway. The property includes a driveway, a small garage or carport, and minimalistic landscaping with a few palm trees and shrubs. The front facade is defined by a prominent fence and a gate, providing privacy and a clear boundary from the street. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped yard, pool, and a prominent front fence. The design is compact, with large windows and minimalistic features.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the flat roof, pool, driveway, and overall property layout.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the fence, gate, entryway, and main facade with windows.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the backyard, pool, and garage/carport area.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the length of the fence, side windows, and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
